title: Add epic-close retro procedure and .tick/learnings.md convention to claude-runner.md
description:
Implement spec §2 (docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md) in skills/ticks/references/claude-runner.md.

Add an 'Epic-close retro' section (runs inside every epic close-out task, before closing the epic):
1. Harvest: read all tick notes from the epic, all DONE_WITH_CONCERNS reports, and orchestrator integration notes (conflicts, re-dispatches, blocked ticks).
2. Promote each learning to exactly one tier: prevention rule for any future work -> CLAUDE.md (terse); permanent architecture knowledge -> docs/; operational gotcha for future implementer agents -> .tick/learnings.md; one-off detail -> stays in tick notes (do nothing); doc proven wrong -> fix or delete the doc.
3. Compact .tick/learnings.md after adding: merge duplicates, delete outgrown entries, enforce hard cap of 150 lines.
4. Outside-in verification: per epic scope item, verify against code/tests (not tick status); gaps are fixed now or surfaced to the human, never silently deferred.
5. Drift review: skim the epic's full diff for agent-typical patches (workaround flags, suppressed errors, copy-paste variants, defensive bloat, HACK/workaround comments); real drift becomes cleanup ticks in the next epic.
6. Retro report: short summary as the epic close reason / note (learnings by destination, verification table, drift found, proposed roadmap adjustments for the human).

Also define the .tick/learnings.md format where the section introduces it: short Problem -> Cause -> Rule entries under category headers; 150-line hard cap; read fresh at point of use, never inlined from orchestrator memory (the orchestrator session spans epics, so an inlined copy goes stale after a retro).

Files: skills/ticks/references/claude-runner.md only. Do NOT touch the implementer prompt template or add discipline rules — separate tick covers those.
acceptance_criteria: claude-runner.md has the retro section with all 6 steps and the promotion tier table; .tick/learnings.md format + 150-line cap + read-fresh rule documented
